welcome.title: Welcome to React Boilerplate
welcome.body: This is a clean starter template for your next project.

demoHub.title: Starter overview
demoHub.intro: This is a reusable frontend boilerplate. The links below demonstrate the patterns it ships with. All demo content is safe to remove when adopting the boilerplate.

signIn.title: Sign In
signIn.description: Auth adapter boundary, form pattern, validation, loading and error states.

welcome.title: Guest Welcome
welcome.description: Guest layout, language switching, and reusable layout primitives.

dashboard.title: Authenticated Dashboard
dashboard.description: Protected route, query layer, and async data states. Sign in to view it.

onboarding.title: Onboarding Flow
onboarding.description: Multi-step flow layout with progress and back/next behavior.

removal.title: Demo-only
removal.body: Remove this page and related demo routes when adopting the boilerplate. See docs/adoption.md.

signIn.title: Sign In
signIn.demoMessage: Enter any credentials to sign in (Demo)

welcome.heading: Step 1 of 3
welcome.title: Welcome
welcome.body: This quick setup takes just a moment. We will walk you through a few steps to get you started.

preferences.heading: Step 2 of 3
preferences.title: Your Preferences
preferences.body: Choose the settings that work best for you. You can always change these later.

complete.heading: Step 3 of 3
complete.title: You are all set
complete.body: Setup is complete. Everything is ready for you.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: This is a protected user dashboard.

generic.title: Something went wrong
generic.description: The application encountered an unexpected error.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: We couldn’t find the page you requested.
